titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of TNA DL 36/3/12

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=862 status=live modified=2021-02-02 18:06:26.421363+00 | translation moa=863 status=live modified=2017-07-05 08:53:00.769776+00

p.cl: Omnibus hominibus Has Litteras visuris uel audituris . Robertus de Brus salutem

Sciatis me dedisse. et Concessisse et
hac presenti carta mea confirmasse vmfrido filio Simonis et heredibus suis pro Homagio et seruitio suo Hunnelve
croft \per rectas diuisas/ Libere et quiete. Honorifice et pacifice. Hunc et predictum Croftum  tenebunt ipse predictus Vmfridus et here
di sui de me et Heredibus meis. Reddendo mihi et heredibus meis annuatim duo calcaria deaurata. Infra nun
dinas Karlioli.

Hiis Testibus Hugone de Corri. Willelmo de Heriz. Ricardo de Bosco. Roberto de Crossebi. Ric’.
de Humeth . Laurencio de berkelai. Willelmo franceis. Hugone filio hamelin. Iuone filio hamelin
To all people who shall view or hear these letters Robert de Brus sends greeting.

Let them know me to have given, and granted, and made firm by this present charter, to Humphrey fitz Simon and his heirs in return for his homage and service 'Hunnelvecroft' \by the correct boundaries/ freely and quitly, honourably and peaceably. This and the aforesaid croft the aforesaid Humphrey and his heirs shall hold of me and my heirs, rendering to me and my heirs annually two golden spurs at the time of the Carlisle fair.
With these witnesses: Hugh of Corrie; Williem de Heriz; Richard del Bois; Robert of Crosby; Richard de Humez; Laurence of Berkeley; William Francis; Hugh fitz Hamelin; Ivo fitz Hamelin.
